sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: IBM to Add 750 Jobs in AI, Quantum Computing at Chicago Tech Hub
feed.summary: IBM plans to add 750 jobs over the next five years at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park in Chicago, focusing on artificial intelligence, quantum computing, cybersecurity, and data science. The company will receive $19 million in state tax credits and establish the FutureNow Chicago center at the tech hub. This initiative deepens IBM's investment in the region and aligns with Illinois Governor JB Pritzker's support for technological advancements.

feed.title: Uber app adds hotel bookings through Expedia, with 700,000 properties planned
feed.summary: Uber Technologies announced new products and features at its GO-GET event, including a partnership with Expedia Group allowing users to book hotels directly within the Uber app, with plans to offer over 700,000 properties globally. The update aims to simplify travel logistics for users, with Uber One members receiving benefits like 10% back in credits, and will later integrate Vrbo vacation rentals. Additionally, Expedia will integrate Uber rides into its app, and Uber introduced other features like Travel Mode, global Uber One benefits, "Shop for Me," and AI-powered Voice Bookings.

feed.title: Which Is the Better Small-Cap ETF, Vanguard's VB or State Street's SPSM?
feed.summary: This article compares two small-cap ETFs, Vanguard's VB and State Street's SPSM, highlighting their similarities in expense ratios and key differences in diversification, dividend yield, and index methodology. While VB offers broader diversification, SPSM provides a higher dividend yield and higher quality exposure through its profitability screening. The choice between the two depends on investor preference for diversification versus yield and quality.

feed.title: Selling pressure pushes Dollar General stock lower in today's trading
feed.summary: Dollar General Corporation (DG) saw its stock fall by 2.18% to $113.34, trading below its key moving averages, which indicates persistent bearish pressure. Experts from Traders Union note that all momentum and sentiment indicators point to a strong downtrend, with Anton Kharitonov highlighting the lack of supportive news and potential for further downside if $110.56 fails. Conversely, Viktoras Karapetjanc suggests the current volatility could offer buying opportunities for forward-looking investors if sentiment shifts positively.

feed.title: Wells Fargo (WFC) issues $430,000 notes; 5.20% coupon, callable 2029
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company is offering $430,000 in Fixed Rate Callable Medium-Term Notes, Series AA, with a 5.20% annual coupon. These notes, due April 30, 2041, are callable by Wells Fargo semi-annually starting April 30, 2029. The offering price is $1,000 per note, with potential variations for institutional investors, and the notes are senior unsecured obligations not FDIC insured or exchange-listed.

feed.title: Paychex Inc. Stock (US7043261079): Q3 2026 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Payroll Growth
feed.summary: Paychex Inc. (NASDAQ: PAYX) announced strong Q3 fiscal 2026 results, surpassing revenue and EPS expectations due to robust demand from U.S. small businesses for payroll and HR services. The company reported $1.32 billion in revenue, a 4.2% year-over-year increase, and adjusted EPS of $1.25, exceeding forecasts. Paychex reaffirmed its full-year guidance, highlighting its stable business model, dividend growth streak, and strong position in the U.S. payroll processing market.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America Stock (US6951561022): Reports Strong Q1 2026 Results
feed.summary: Packaging Corp of America (NYSE: PKG) has reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with revenue reaching $2.0 billion, a 5% increase year-over-year, largely due to strong containerboard demand. The company also announced adjusted EPS of $2.10, surpassing consensus estimates, and a net income of $190 million for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. This performance highlights the company's resilience in the packaging sector, driven by demand from e-commerce and food industries.

feed.title: CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) Sets New 12-Month Low Following Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) shares hit a new 52-week low after Needham & Company LLC lowered its price target from $60 to $50, and other analysts also trimmed their targets, creating selling pressure. Despite beating Q1 earnings expectations with $0.23 EPS and 23% revenue growth, raising FY2026 adjusted EBITDA guidance, and authorizing a $1.5 billion share buyback, the stock traded down about 6.2%. Investor concerns over Homes.com spending, AI risks, and the stock's high trailing P/E ratio contributed to the decline.

feed.title: Live Nation's $30 concert ticket sale begins today. Here's a list of DC-area shows included
feed.summary: Live Nation is launching its "Summer of Live" concert series, offering $30 tickets to thousands of shows nationwide, including many in the D.C. area. The sale, which began today, April 29th, 2026, features artists like Wu-Tang Clan, Pitbull, Tim McGraw, and TLC & Salt-N-Pepa. The offer ends on May 5th, 2026, and tickets are expected to sell out quickly.

feed.title: General Mills faces setback in supply chain sustainability push
feed.summary: General Mills experienced a setback in its supply chain sustainability efforts in fiscal 2025, with total greenhouse gas emissions reduction falling to 14% from 19% in the prior year, against a 2020 baseline. The company also saw increased water usage per ton of finished product and struggled to meet animal welfare standards for broiler chickens. However, all manufacturing facilities achieved zero-waste-to-landfill status, and 95% of packaging was designed to be recyclable or reusable.

feed.title: Take-Two CEO Reveals GTA 6 Price Strategy and Hints at Return of L.A. Noire
feed.summary: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick discussed the company's pricing strategy for games like GTA 6, emphasizing that consumers pay for value and that the price charged should be fair for the experience received. He also hinted that Rockstar Games has not forgotten about legacy IP like L.A. Noire, and that their teams are always considering such titles for potential future development. GTA 6 is set to launch on November 19 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.

feed.title: Franklin Resources raised to Hold-equivalent at Barclays after Q2 financial results (BEN:NYSE)
feed.summary: Barclays upgraded Franklin Resources (BEN) to a Hold-equivalent rating following the release of its second-quarter financial results, citing improving fundamentals. The asset manager's shares rose 2% after the market opened after reporting FQ2 non-GAAP EPS of $0.71, beating analyst estimates by $0.16.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories Stock: Why Analysts Rate a Buy in 2026
feed.summary: Despite a recent stock decline of 22.5% year-to-date and tempered full-year 2026 guidance, Abbott Laboratories (ABT) is largely rated a "buy" by analysts due to its underlying business strength and strategic acquisitions. The Exact Sciences deal, adding the Cologuard test, is expected to layer significant incremental revenue, while its medical devices segment continues strong growth. Analysts anticipate that post-dilution, the combined portfolio will drive accelerating earnings growth from 2027 onwards, with a TIKR model suggesting a mid-case target of $154.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts Price Target on CMS Energy to $85 From $84, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target on CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) to $85 from $84, while reaffirming an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst movements, including Barclays lowering its target and Morgan Stanley adjusting theirs. CMS Energy recently reported beating profit estimates for Q1 2026 and boosted its capital expenditure plan.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: FirstEnergy tops Q1 2026 forecasts, stock dips
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corporation (FE) reported Q1 2026 earnings per share of $0.72 and revenue of $4.2 billion, both exceeding analyst forecasts. Despite these strong results, the company's stock declined by 1.59% in premarket trading. FirstEnergy reaffirmed its full-year 2026 core earnings guidance and highlighted its strategic investments in regulated businesses and ongoing cost management efforts.

feed.title: Teradyne Q1 2026 slides: record AI-driven results meet skeptical market
feed.summary: Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) reported record-breaking Q1 2026 results, with revenue of $1.282 billion and non-GAAP EPS of $2.56, both exceeding analyst expectations, largely driven by AI-related demand. Despite the strong performance and nearly 70% of revenue being AI-driven, the stock plunged over 18% in premarket trading due to investor concerns about the sustainability of AI growth, premium valuations, and Q2 guidance indicating a sequential revenue decline. The company's long-term outlook projects sustained AI-driven growth, aiming for $6 billion in revenue and $9.50-$11.00 non-GAAP EPS in an expanded ATE market.

feed.title: Stifel Maintains Buy Rating on Monster Beverage (MNST)
feed.summary: Stifel maintained a Buy rating on Monster Beverage (MNST) but lowered its price target to $90 from $92. Other firms like TD Cowen and RBC Capital also adjusted their price targets and ratings, citing caution on consumer staples due to various macroeconomic factors. Monster Beverage develops, markets, sells, and distributes energy drinks and beverage concentrates globally.

feed.title: Insulet Corporation stock hits 52-week low at 177.81 USD
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation's stock has hit a 52-week low of $177.81, reflecting a challenging year with a 29.13% decline. Despite its recent sales growth and an InvestingPro tip suggesting the stock is undervalued and oversold, the company faces competitive pressures and recently announced a voluntary recall of some Omnipod 5 insulin pumps. Analyst ratings have been adjusted downwards due to increased competition from upcoming hybrid patch devices.

feed.title: Truist raises Hilton stock price target to $312 on RevPAR outlook
feed.summary: Truist Securities has increased its price target for Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) to $312 from $307, maintaining a Hold rating. The firm anticipates Hilton's revenue per available room (RevPAR) growth in 2026 to surpass company guidance, driven by favorable booking data, holiday timing shifts, and strong demand, despite a cautious macroeconomic environment. InvestingPro data also indicates 13 analysts have revised earnings upwards, and the stock is considered undervalued.

feed.title: Transcript : FirstEnergy Corp., Q1 2026 Earnings Call, Apr 29, 2026
feed.summary: This article provides the transcript of FirstEnergy Corp.'s Q1 2026 Earnings Call held on April 29, 2026. The initial content is limited, indicating that the full transcript is reserved for subscribers. The article also includes recent news regarding FirstEnergy's financial performance, including a rise in quarterly profit due to higher rates and data-center demand, and updated price targets from various analysts.

feed.title: South Plains Financial (NASDAQ:SPFI) Shares Gap Down After Earnings Miss
feed.summary: South Plains Financial (NASDAQ:SPFI) shares gapped down after reporting Q1 earnings of $0.85 per share, missing consensus estimates of $0.88. Despite the earnings miss, the company completed its acquisition of BOH, which management expects to be accretive to earnings by 2027, and authorized a $10 million share buyback program and declared a quarterly dividend. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating on the stock with an average target price of $46.75.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific launches applied Biosystems PowerFlex Thermal Cycler
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has introduced the Applied Biosystems PowerFlex Thermal Cycler, a new PCR instrument designed to enhance flexibility, thermal performance, and productivity in molecular biology labs. It features updated block technology, an intuitive interface, and flexible configurations including 96-well and 3x32-well models, catering to various assay throughputs and workflows. This cycler aims to meet the growing demand for accurate and fast PCR results across life science research, applied testing, and DNA identification.

feed.title: Danaher posts $6B quarter and raises 2026 profit outlook
feed.summary: Danaher reported strong Q1 2026 results with $6.0 billion in revenue and adjusted diluted EPS of $2.06, leading the company to raise its full-year 2026 EPS guidance to $8.35–$8.55. The company also announced its intention to acquire Masimo Corporation, further expanding its diagnostics and patient monitoring portfolio. This performance positions Danaher within a growing trend of investment in AI-powered diagnostics, highlighted by other companies like Medtronic and VentriPoint Diagnostics making significant advancements and acquisitions in the sector.

feed.title: Arm & Hammer maker sets June 1 payout for 501st straight dividend
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. announced its 501st regular quarterly dividend of $0.3075 per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company, known for its Arm & Hammer brand, manufactures and markets a variety of personal care, household, and specialty products. This declaration underscores the company's consistent return to shareholders.

feed.title: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. Declares 501st Regular Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) has announced its 501st regular quarterly dividend of $0.3075 cents per share. This dividend is payable on June 1, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company manufactures and markets a variety of personal care, household, and specialty products, including those under the Arm & Hammer brand.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker Q1 2026 slides: earnings beat, margins on track
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE:SWK) reported strong Q1 2026 results, surpassing analyst expectations with adjusted EPS of $0.80 and revenue of $3.85 billion, leading to a 1.7% rise in pre-market trading. The company's strategic initiatives, including the completion of the Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing (CAM) divestiture, are contributing to debt reduction and a projected increase in gross margins. Stanley Black & Decker reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance, highlighting its focus on operational excellence, brand activation, and innovation to drive shareholder value.

feed.title: SYY - Sysco Corp Stock Price and Quote
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive overview of Sysco Corp (SYY) stock, including its current price, financial metrics, analyst ratings, and latest news. Deutsche Bank recently downgraded Sysco to Hold, citing concerns over the Restaurant Depot deal, while the company also announced Q3 2026 earnings and details about the $29 billion acquisition of Jetro Restaurant Depot. The insider trading section shows recent proposed and actual sales by company officers and directors.

feed.title: Stock Of The Day: Where Will The Centene Rally End?
feed.summary: The Centene (NYSE:CNC) stock rally highlights the market principle that "markets have memories," where important price levels retain significance as either resistance or support over extended periods. The stock has demonstrated repeated resistance at $74 and consistent support around $26. Looking ahead, the article suggests potential resistance at $53.25, a prior support level where regretful investors might trigger sell orders.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Stock Slips on Revenue Miss
feed.summary: Enphase Energy Inc (NASDAQ: ENPH) slipped 8.4% after reporting better-than-expected Q1 earnings but missing revenue estimates due to weaker demand, breaching its year-to-date breakeven level. Despite the drop, options traders are unfazed, with call options being more popular than put options, and short interest remaining high. Analyst price targets have been cut, but a support level at $31 is helping to contain losses.

feed.title: Abbott’s Ultreon 3.0 AI Imaging Clearance And What It Means For Valuation
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories received FDA and CE Mark clearance for its AI-powered Ultreon 3.0 Software, a next-generation coronary imaging platform designed for minimally invasive heart procedures. This clearance represents a new product development for the company, whose shares have seen recent weakness despite the positive news, though they are considered undervalued by Simply Wall St. Investors should monitor how the Ultreon 3.0 impacts procedure volumes and revenue, as the company's net profit margin has declined compared to the previous year.

feed.title: Uber Adds Hotel Bookings to Its App Through New Expedia Partnership
feed.summary: Uber Technologies Inc. is expanding its services by integrating hotel bookings into its main app through a new partnership with Expedia Group Inc. This move, announced during Uber's annual product event, will initially launch in the US and aims to broaden Uber's presence in the travel market with vacation rentals from Vrbo to follow later this year. The initiative is part of Uber's strategy to evolve into an "everything platform."

feed.title: Enphase Energy, Inc. Stock Slides as Q1 Reveals a Solar Demand Hangover
feed.summary: Enphase Energy's stock fell by 7.3% after its first-quarter revenue dropped to $282.9 million and the company reported a GAAP loss, highlighting a significant decline in U.S. rooftop solar demand. Although adjusted earnings surpassed estimates, investors sought stronger assurances of market stabilization. The company is actively introducing new initiatives, including a prepaid lease program and an AI data center power solution, to diversify and navigate the challenging market conditions.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Boosts Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) Price Target to $59.00
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) to $59.00 from $46.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 16.93% for the energy company's stock. Several other firms have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for DVN, with institutional investors showing significant activity in the stock.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) Price Target Raised to $149.00 at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) to $149.00 from $108.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a potential upside of 18.36%. This follows several other analysts who have also increased their price objectives on the energy producer's stock. Despite missing consensus earnings estimates in its last quarterly report, ConocoPhillips currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, with an average target price of $132.44.

feed.title: Textron declares $0.02 quarterly dividend per share
feed.summary: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share, payable on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026. This announcement comes amid other significant company developments, including new aircraft purchase agreements, FAA approvals for connectivity upgrades, and defense contract modifications. Despite a lowered price target from Jefferies, the firm maintained a Buy rating on Textron stock.

feed.title: Generac shares boosted by data center strength, Stifel says
feed.summary: Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) saw its shares boosted and 2026 guidance raised due to stronger-than-expected first-quarter results, driven primarily by momentum in its data center business. Stifel noted the company's adjusted EBITDA guidance for 2026 is now approximately $940 million at the midpoint, surpassing both Stifel's pre-release forecast and consensus estimates. The increase is attributed to robust commercial and industrial sales, especially in data centers, and improved margins.

feed.title: Silicon Laboratories stock hits all-time high at 216.57 USD
feed.summary: Silicon Laboratories (SLAB) stock has reached an all-time high of $216.57, marking a 112% one-year change and 65% year-to-date return, driven by strong revenue growth. Despite this impressive performance, InvestingPro data suggests the stock is currently overvalued. The company is also set to be acquired by Texas Instruments for approximately $7.5 billion, a deal expected to close in the first half of 2027.

feed.title: Fair Isaac (FICO) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) reported strong Q2 2026 results with total revenue up 39% year-over-year to $692 million and GAAP net income up 63% to $264 million, driven primarily by growth in B2B scores and mortgage origination. The company raised its full-year 2026 guidance, anticipating $2.45 billion in revenue. Management also discussed their strategy for FICO Score 10T adoption through new performance-based pricing and expressed confidence in FICO's competitive position against VantageScore in the mortgage market.

feed.title: [144] CENTERPOINT ENERGY INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on a Form 144 SEC filing by CenterPoint Energy Inc. (CNP). The filing indicates a proposed sale of 23,558 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $1,012,758.42, acquired through restricted stock vesting as compensation. The sale is scheduled for April 29, 2026, via Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC on the NYSE.

feed.title: Lower 48 operational progress lifts ConocoPhillips stock 1.05% amid mixed technical signals
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) stock rose 1.05% to $125.63, driven by strong operational progress in its Lower 48 business unit. While the company maintains a bullish trend across all timeframes with strong support from moving averages, short-term indicators show mixed signals with overbought conditions and momentum divergence, suggesting potential near-term consolidation. Analysts predict consolidation between $125.35 and $127.81 for the coming week, with a high probability of testing new highs if bullish momentum continues.

feed.title: Medtronic secures CE mark for Stealth AXiS surgical system
feed.summary: Medtronic has received CE mark approval for its Stealth AXiS surgical system for spine and cranial procedures, following its earlier clearance in the U.S. This approval enables Medtronic to launch the system, which integrates surgical planning, navigation, and robotics, in Europe. The Stealth AXiS system is expected to enhance Medtronic's market share in the cranial and spinal technologies sector and will likely contribute to sales, with early indications possibly emerging in the company's Q4 results in June.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 7.51% stake in American Electric Power (AEP) via Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.51% beneficial ownership stake in American Electric Power Co Inc (AEP) via a Schedule 13G filing. This amounts to 40,827,015 shares of Common Stock as of March 31, 2026, with Vanguard possessing sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 5,688,593 shares. The filing indicates passive institutional ownership, with no single outside person holding more than 5% of the reported securities.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management reports 45.75M Xcel stake (NYSE: XEL)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.33% stake in Xcel Energy Inc. (NYSE: XEL), holding 45,753,794 shares of common stock. This disclosure, made via a SCHEDULE 13G filing, indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares, but sole voting power for 6,264,632 shares. The filing underscores a significant passive institutional investment in Xcel Energy.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 33.6M-share stake in Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a substantial stake of 33,612,105 shares, or 7.37%, in Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd (NCLH) as of March 31, 2026. This passive investment disclosure was made through a Schedule 13G filing, indicating Vanguard holds significant dispositive power over these shares, with a smaller portion having sole voting power. The filing notes that these holdings include securities from various Vanguard funds and affiliates, reflecting a typical institutional ownership structure for asset managers.

feed.title: AbbVie Reports First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, exceeding expectations with net revenues of $15.002 billion, an increase of 12.4%. Key growth drivers like Skyrizi and Rinvoq contributed significantly to the immunology portfolio's 16.4% growth. The company also raised its full-year 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance, reflecting confidence in its pipeline progress and business fundamentals.

feed.title: Amcor stock hits 52-week low at 37.94 USD
feed.summary: Amcor (NYSE: AMCR) stock has reached a new 52-week low of $37.95, even though InvestingPro analysis suggests it is undervalued with a Fair Value of $43.45. The company offers a 6.75% dividend yield and has consistently raised its dividend for seven years. Despite the stock drop, recent news includes outperforming EPS forecasts in Q2 2026, positive analyst ratings with price targets of $54-$60, and the opening of a new healthcare packaging facility in Malaysia.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 19.4M Alliant Energy (LNT) shares — 7.54% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.54% stake in Alliant Energy Corp (LNT), holding 19,403,442 shares. This disclosure, made via a SCHEDULE 13G SEC filing, indicates Vanguard's sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 2,703,980 shares. The filing includes holdings by various Vanguard affiliated investment entities and funds.

feed.title: American Water boosts payout to $0.895 a share, payable June 2
feed.summary: American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) announced an 8.2% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.8950 per share, payable on June 2, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 12, 2026. This aligns with the company's long-term financial target of 7-9% annual EPS and dividend growth, maintaining a target dividend payout ratio of 55-60% of earnings. American Water also offers a dividend reinvestment and direct purchase plan for its shareholders.

feed.title: 5 Questions to Ask Yourself Before Getting the American Express® Gold Card
feed.summary: This article guides potential applicants through five critical questions to consider before getting the American Express Gold Card. It covers eligibility for the welcome offer, whether the annual fee is justifiable through statement credits and earning potential, how spending habits align with the card's bonus categories, the value of Membership Rewards points, and introduces alternative credit card options. The piece emphasizes that while the Amex Gold is excellent for dining and grocery spending, its benefits must align with an individual's financial habits to truly be worthwhile.

feed.title: Hilton Worldwide (NYSE:HLT) Stock Price Expected to Rise, HSBC Analyst Says
feed.summary: HSBC has increased its price target for Hilton Worldwide (NYSE:HLT) from $353 to $387, maintaining a "buy" rating and suggesting a 22.46% upside. This comes after Hilton beat its Q1 EPS expectations but provided Q2 and FY 2026 guidance that was below consensus. Despite CEO Christopher Nassetta selling a significant number of shares, institutional investors have shown strong interest, with Norges Bank acquiring a new position worth approximately $803 million.
